name: Gingerbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Butter and flour a 10-inch diameter spring form pan.
3. In a medium bowl, sift together the first six ingredients: flour, cinnamon, baking soda, clove, salt, and sugar.
4. In a large bowl, combine the oil, molasses, water, eggs, and minced ginger. Whisk until well blended.
5. Gradually add the crystallized ginger to the mixture in the large bowl.
6. Stir in the dry ingredients from the medium bowl.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
8. Bake for about 1 hour, or until a tester inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Allow the cake to cool in the pan on a rack for 1 hour. The cake may fall in the center.
10. Run a sharp knife around the sides of the pan to loosen the cake.
11. Carefully remove the pan sides from the cake.
12. Serve the cake slightly warm or at room temperature. It can be prepared up to 1 day ahead. Wrap it tightly in foil and refrigerate. Bring it to room temperature before serving.
